name: F5 BIG-IP WAF (ASM)
description: F5 BIG-IP iControl REST API for managing Application Security Manager (ASM) WAF policies, signatures, and virtual servers

auth_config.note: Uses HTTP Basic Authentication or token-based auth via X-F5-Auth-Token header

actions.name: List ASM Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all Application Security Manager (WAF) policies

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression to narrow results

actions.name: Get ASM Policy
actions.description: Retrieve a specific ASM WAF policy by ID

actions.name: List Policy Signatures
actions.description: Retrieve all attack signatures in an ASM policy

actions.name: List Policy Violations
actions.description: Retrieve violation settings for an ASM policy

actions.name: List IP Address Exceptions
actions.description: Retrieve IP address exception (whitelist) entries for a policy

actions.name: Block IP Address
actions.description: Add an IP address to the ASM policy deny list

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: IP address entry including ipAddress, ipMask, blockReason, and trustedByPolicyBuilder flag

actions.name: Get Security Events
actions.description: Retrieve ASM security events and request logs

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter for events (e.g., by date, severity, or attack type)

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: List Virtual Servers
actions.description: Retrieve all virtual servers configured on the BIG-IP

actions.name: Apply ASM Policy
actions.description: Apply pending changes to an ASM policy

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Policy reference including policyReference link to the policy to apply
